title: Rocket Lab Announces First Quarter 2025 Financial Results, Posting Quarterly Revenue of $123m
text: Rocket Lab announced strong first quarter 2025 financial results, posting quarterly revenue of $123 million, representing 32% year-over-year growth and placing the results at the top end of the company's guidance. The company continued to demonstrate operational strength with its launch services and space systems segments both contributing to the strong revenue performance. Q1 2025 marked a continued positive trajectory for the company as it works toward profitability while maintaining aggressive investment in the Neutron development program. The strong Q1 performance reinforced investor confidence in the company's ability to scale revenue while managing operational expenses.
